name: LangGraph Orchestrator
description: Runtime orchestration plugin that lets LangGraph enrich OpenClaw sessions with retrieval, planning hints, reflection, and compaction checkpoints.

apiHost.help: Hostname of the LangGraph runtime API

autoRetrieve.help: Fetch retrieval context before agent start

autoReflect.label: Auto Reflect
autoReflect.help: Persist turns and schedule asynchronous reflection
